_schema.note: Coarse comparative buckets for the instant shortlist; AI/web search refines on demand.

attributes.language_ease: french | english | easy | medium | hard (ease for a French speaker)
attributes.visa: easy | medium | hard (for an EU/French citizen)
attributes.languages: array of languages a resident uses (official + widely-spoken English); matched against the user's known languages

countries.name: Australia
countries.summary_fr: Niveau de vie élevé, climat agréable, immigration sélective.
countries.summary_en: High living standards, pleasant climate, selective immigration.

countries.name: Belgium
countries.summary_fr: Francophone (Wallonie/Bruxelles), proche, dans l'UE.
countries.summary_en: French-speaking (Wallonia/Brussels), close by, in the EU.

countries.name: Canada
countries.summary_fr: Anglophone et francophone (Québec), très stable, hivers froids.
countries.summary_en: English and French (Quebec), very stable, cold winters.

countries.name: Chile
countries.summary_fr: Paysages spectaculaires, économie stable pour la région.
countries.summary_en: Spectacular landscapes, stable economy for the region.

countries.name: Costa Rica
countries.summary_fr: Démocratie stable sans armée, nature exceptionnelle.
countries.summary_en: Stable democracy with no army, exceptional nature.

countries.name: Cyprus
countries.summary_fr: Dans l'UE, anglais répandu, fiscalité douce, climat chaud.
countries.summary_en: In the EU, English common, light taxation, warm climate.

countries.name: France
countries.summary_fr: Point de référence : votre situation actuelle pour comparer les destinations.
countries.summary_en: Reference point: your current situation, to compare destinations against.

countries.name: Germany
countries.summary_fr: Économie solide, services publics fiables, hivers gris.
countries.summary_en: Strong economy, reliable public services, grey winters.

countries.name: Greece
countries.summary_fr: Coût de la vie bas, climat méditerranéen, îles superbes.
countries.summary_en: Low cost of living, Mediterranean climate, beautiful islands.

countries.name: Ireland
countries.summary_fr: Anglophone, dans l'UE, économie dynamique, souvent pluvieux.
countries.summary_en: English-speaking, in the EU, dynamic economy, often rainy.

countries.name: Italy
countries.summary_fr: Culture, gastronomie, climat varié, mais bureaucratie lourde.
countries.summary_en: Culture, food, varied climate, but heavy bureaucracy.

countries.name: Japan
countries.summary_fr: Extrêmement sûr, langue difficile, culture unique.
countries.summary_en: Extremely safe, difficult language, unique culture.

countries.name: Malaysia
countries.summary_fr: Anglais répandu, coût bas, programme de résidence MM2H.
countries.summary_en: English common, low cost, MM2H residency program.

countries.name: Mauritius
countries.summary_fr: Francophone, île sûre et stable, fiscalité attractive.
countries.summary_en: French-speaking, safe and stable island, attractive taxation.

countries.name: Mexico
countries.summary_fr: Coût de la vie très bas, grande communauté d'expatriés.
countries.summary_en: Very low cost of living, large expat community.

countries.name: Morocco
countries.summary_fr: Francophone, proche, coût de la vie bas, climat ensoleillé.
countries.summary_en: French-speaking, close, low cost of living, sunny climate.

countries.name: Netherlands
countries.summary_fr: Très anglophone au quotidien, sûr, excellent vélo et services.
countries.summary_en: English widely spoken, safe, excellent cycling and services.

countries.name: New Zealand
countries.summary_fr: Très sûr et stable, nature spectaculaire, mais éloigné.
countries.summary_en: Very safe and stable, spectacular nature, but remote.

countries.name: Panama
countries.summary_fr: Dollar US, fiscalité douce, programmes de résidence accessibles.
countries.summary_en: US dollar, light taxation, accessible residency programs.

countries.name: Portugal
countries.summary_fr: Climat doux, coût de la vie modéré, sûr et accueillant pour les expatriés.
countries.summary_en: Mild climate, moderate cost of living, safe and welcoming to newcomers.

countries.name: Spain
countries.summary_fr: Climat chaud, forte culture, vaste communauté internationale.
countries.summary_en: Warm climate, rich culture, large international community.

countries.name: Switzerland
countries.summary_fr: Régions francophones, très sûr et stable, coût très élevé.
countries.summary_en: French-speaking regions, very safe and stable, very expensive.

countries.name: Thailand
countries.summary_fr: Coût de la vie très bas, climat tropical, visas variables.
countries.summary_en: Very low cost of living, tropical climate, variable visas.

countries.name: United Arab Emirates
countries.summary_fr: Aucune imposition sur le revenu, très sûr, été très chaud.
countries.summary_en: No income tax, very safe, extremely hot summers.

countries.name: United Kingdom
countries.summary_fr: Anglophone, hors UE depuis le Brexit, visas plus stricts.
countries.summary_en: English-speaking, outside the EU since Brexit, stricter visas.

countries.name: United States
countries.summary_fr: Opportunités vastes, mais santé coûteuse et visas difficiles.
countries.summary_en: Vast opportunity, but costly healthcare and hard visas.

countries.name: Uruguay
countries.summary_fr: Démocratie très stable d'Amérique du Sud, espagnol requis.
countries.summary_en: Notably stable South American democracy; Spanish required.
